name: zaunekko
description: ZaunEkko's public-release-ready Claude Code marketplace for purpose-specific plugins and documented compatibility distributions.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: A third-party compatibility distribution of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin with compact dynamic current-model attribution, optional effort metadata, explicit detached-session binding, and a PreToolUse guard for direct Bash and known Playwright unsafe-process commit paths. Enable it instead of, not alongside, the official distribution.

plugins.name: ekko-image-gen
plugins.description: Context-aware OpenAI-compatible image generation with bounded workers, parent visual review, absolute paths, and temporary loopback HTTP preview links without automatic GUI launch.
